headline: Europe once again signals openness to dialogue with Putin on Ukraine war
description: European countries seek to reopen a channel of communication with Russia, with France first among them, at a time when the US appears to be losing interest in the war in Ukraine.

headline: France experiences its hottest spring ever recorded
California's primary elections serves as test for divided Democrats
France inaugurates memorial to victims of Rwandan genocide
description: A double stele by artist Grada Kilomba, overlooking the Seine in Paris, was to be unveiled on Tuesday by French President Emmanuel Macron and Rwandan President Paul Kagame.

headline: New study busts myth of the idle job seeker
description: A majority of job seekers immediately prioritize finding a job after registering with the employment agency, according to a new study by the unemployment insurance body. However, those returning to work often have to do with short-term contracts.

headline: Ukraine's Kostyuk sets up clash with Russia's Andreeva in French Open semi-final
description: Marta Kostyuk beat compatriot Elina Svitolina in their three-set quarter-final on Tuesday. Earlier in the day, Mirra Andreeva breezed into the next round with a comprehensive defeat of Romania's Sorana Cirstea.

headline: The 20 French cities where the country's wealthiest live
description: The city of Neuilly-sur-Seine outside Paris has the highest proportion of very wealthy households in France, according to a study by the Inequality Observatory published on Tuesday. The ranking is dominated by the western suburbs of Paris and the areas surrounding Geneva.

The Fontainebleau Forest's ever-growing popularity threatens this jewel of biodiversity near Paris
description: Managers of the forest complex are wondering how to deal with the increasing influx of visitors: Will development contain overtourism or encourage it?

headline: Trump weakens Netanyahu by forcing him to delay attack on Beirut
description: The US president ordered Israel not to attack the Lebanese capital. As with Gaza or Iran, only Donald Trump can restrain Israel's military force. This has caused frustration within the country's governing coalition, further weakening Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu.

headline: The Bolloré protégée spreading Russian propaganda in France
description: Xenia Fedorova, the former director of the now-banned Russian channel RT France, has free rein to advance the Kremlin's version of events without contradiction across the media empire of far-right billionaire Vincent Bolloré.
